hero.headline:
Empowering Businesses with
Elite Workforce Solutions
hero.subheadline: Singapore's trusted partner for skilled manpower, logistics, and cleaning staff. Fully MOM-compliant and ready to deploy.

about.title: Driving Efficiency Through People
about.description: At RNS Technology, we believe that the right people drive business success. Established in Singapore, we specialize in providing high-quality, reliable, and compliant manpower solutions across various industries.
about.sub_description: We adhere strictly to Ministry of Manpower (MOM) regulations, ensuring peace of mind for our clients and fair treatment for our staff.

services.title: General Manpower
services.desc: Reliable general workers for production, events, and ad-hoc projects.

services.title: Skilled Labour
services.desc: Certified technicians, electricians, and tradesmen for specialized tasks.

services.title: Cleaning Crew
services.desc: Professional cleaning staff for commercial, industrial, and office spaces.

services.title: Logistics Staff
services.desc: Drivers, packers, and warehouse assistants to streamline your supply chain.

services.title: Admin & Office
services.desc: Temporary and permanent administrative support and receptionists.

services.title: Security Workforce
services.desc: Trained and licensed security personnel for premises protection.
